---
title: "recreate_chapter.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\recreate_chapter.py"
loc: 158
complexity: 17
logic_score: 5.35
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 3.93
overall_score: 2.01
---

## Intent
The `recreate_chapter.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on RecreateChapterPipeline, __init__, load_world_bible, load_state, save_state, load_character_contract, step_1_director, step_2_characters, step_3_narrator, step_4_auditor, step_5_update_state, run_pipeline, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via RecreateChapterPipeline, __init__, load_world_bible, load_state, save_state, load_character_contract, step_1_director, step_2_characters, step_3_narrator, step_4_auditor, step_5_update_state, run_pipeline, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 26 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `RecreateChapterPipeline`
- `__init__`
- `load_world_bible`
- `load_state`
- `save_state`
- `load_character_contract`
- `step_1_director`
- `step_2_characters`
- `step_3_narrator`
- `step_4_auditor`
- `step_5_update_state`
- `run_pipeline`
- `main`
